lessons.name: Review 3 (Units 7 - 8 - 9)
lessons.description: Review of Units 7, 8, and 9 covering environment, shopping, and natural disasters.

sections.heading: 1. Language - Vocabulary
sections.content:
Unit 7: Environmental Protection

Key vocabulary: environment, pollution, recycle, reuse, reduce, waste, damage, protect, conserve, ecosystem, deforestation, endangered, sustainable

Unit 8: Shopping

Key vocabulary: shopping mall, supermarket, buy, sell, pay, bargain, price, discount, sale, receipt, goods, product, brand

Unit 9: Natural Disasters

Key vocabulary: earthquake, tsunami, flood, storm, typhoon, evacuate, rescue, damage, destroy, victim, casualty, warning, survive

sections.heading: 2. Language - Grammar
sections.content:
Unit 7: Complex Sentences with Time Clauses

Structure: When/While/Before/After/As soon as/Until + S + V, S + V

Note: Tương lai dùng hiện tại đơn trong time clause

Unit 8: Adverbs of Frequency & Present Simple for Future

1. Adverbs: always, usually, often, sometimes, rarely, never

2. Present Simple for Future: Lịch trình cố định

Unit 9: Past Continuous

Structure: S + was/were + V-ing

Usage: Past continuous + when + past simple; While + past continuous, past continuous

sections.heading: 3. Skills - Reading Passages
sections.content:
Passage 1: Environmental Protection

When I see litter on the street, I always pick it up. Before I throw away anything, I think about recycling. I often recycle plastic bottles and paper. While I'm at home, I turn off lights to save energy. As soon as I finish using water, I turn off the tap. We should protect our environment because it's important for our future.

Passage 2: Shopping and Disasters

Yesterday at 3 p.m., I was shopping at the mall when suddenly the building started shaking. It was an earthquake! While people were running out, I was trying to stay calm. The store usually opens at 9 a.m., but it will close tomorrow for safety checks. After the earthquake stopped, rescue teams arrived quickly. Everyone was scared, but fortunately, no one was seriously injured.

sections.heading: 4. Skills - Practice
sections.content:
Questions:

  1. What do you do when you see litter?
  2. What were you doing at 3 p.m. yesterday?
  3. What happened during the earthquake?

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Time Clauses
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: When/Before/After + S + V, S + V

examples.question: When I see litter, I ______ (pick) it up.
examples.solution: When I see litter, I pick it up.

examples.question: I ______ (shop) when the earthquake happened.
examples.solution: I was shopping when the earthquake happened.

exercises.question: When I see litter, I ______ it up.
I ______ shopping when the earthquake happened.
I ______ go shopping on weekends.
exercises.explanation: Trước động từ thường → always go

exercises.question: The shop ______ at 9 tomorrow.
Before you leave, ______ off the lights.
While I ______, she was cooking.
When I ______ school, I will recycle more.
exercises.explanation: Time clause với tương lai → hiện tại đơn

exercises.question: They ______ TV when the storm started.
She ______ shops online.
exercises.explanation: Trước động từ thường → often shops

exercises.question: After we ______, we can relax.
______ you studying at 9 p.m.?
The train ______ at 6 p.m.
I will help as soon as I ______ home.
She ______ when I called.
We ______ buy organic products.
exercises.explanation: Trước động từ thường → sometimes buy

exercises.question: ______ it was raining, we stayed inside.
I ______ my homework when the lights went out.
The sale ______ next week.
I will wait until you ______.
They ______ when the tsunami hit.
We should recycle to protect the environment.
The store always opens at different times.
Past continuous describes actions happening at a specific time in the past.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. Past continuous for actions in progress.

exercises.question: We use 'will' in time clauses for future.
exercises.explanation: Sai. Use present simple in time clauses.

exercises.question: Adverbs of frequency come before main verbs.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. They come before main verbs.

exercises.question: What do you do when you see litter?
exercises.answer: I pick it up / I recycle it

exercises.question: What were you doing at 3 p.m. yesterday?
exercises.answer: I was shopping / studying / working (any past continuous answer)

exercises.question: When does the shop open?
exercises.answer: It opens at 9 a.m. / at a specific time

exercises.question: What happened during the earthquake?
exercises.answer: People were running out / The building was shaking

exercises.question: Write about protecting the environment (80-100 words). Use time clauses.
exercises.sample_answer: When I see litter, I always pick it up. Before I throw anything away, I think about recycling. I recycle plastic bottles and paper. As soon as I finish using water, I turn off the tap. While I'm at home, I turn off lights to save energy. After I go shopping, I reuse the bags. When I finish school, I will plant more trees. We should protect our environment because it's important. If everyone helps, we will have a cleaner planet.
exercises.explanation: Use time clauses: when, before, after, as soon as, while

exercises.question: Write about your shopping habits (80-100 words). Use adverbs of frequency and present simple for future.
exercises.sample_answer: I often go shopping on weekends. I usually shop at the supermarket because it's convenient. I sometimes buy things online. I always compare prices before buying. I never buy things I don't need. The mall opens at 9 a.m. and closes at 10 p.m. The sale starts next week, so I will wait. I rarely use cash; I usually pay by card. Shopping is fun, but I try to be careful with money.
exercises.explanation: Use adverbs of frequency and present simple for schedules

exercises.question: Write about a natural disaster experience (80-100 words). Use past continuous.
exercises.sample_answer: Last year, I experienced an earthquake. At 3 p.m., I was studying at home when suddenly everything started shaking. My family was having lunch in the kitchen. While the earthquake was happening, we were running outside. My neighbors were screaming. After the earthquake stopped, we were checking if everyone was safe. Rescue teams were arriving quickly. People were helping each other. It was scary, but we survived. Now I always keep an emergency kit ready.
exercises.explanation: Use past continuous for actions in progress during the disaster

exercises.question: Combine all topics (80-100 words). Use all grammar from Units 7-9.
exercises.sample_answer: When I go shopping, I always bring reusable bags to protect the environment. The supermarket opens at 8 a.m. every day. Last week, while I was shopping, there was a small earthquake. People were running out, but I was staying calm. After the earthquake stopped, I continued shopping. I often buy eco-friendly products. Before I buy anything, I check if it's sustainable. As soon as I get home, I recycle the packaging. We should protect our environment and be prepared for disasters.
exercises.explanation: Combine time clauses, adverbs of frequency, present simple for future, and past continuous
